title: Bridge Essay: The neural mechanisms of mindfulness-based pain relief: a functional magnetic re

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Emptiness** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Emptiness — self-dissolution, DMN decoupling, ego dissolution, nondual awareness.

**The neural mechanisms of mindfulness-based pain relief: afunctional magnetic resonance imaging-based review and primer.**. Pain Rep.. PMID: 31579851. DOI: 10.1097/PR9.0000000000000759. The advent of neuroimaging methodologies, such as functional magnetic resonance imaging (fMRI), has significantly advanced our understanding of the neurophysiological processes supporting awide spectrum of mind-body approaches to treat pain. Apromising self-regulatory practice, mindfulness meditation, reliably alleviates experimentally induced and clinical pain.
